response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of full-stack engineering across diverse production environments, with strong TypeScript and Node.js depth, recent hands-on AI agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators and agentic workflows, and solid experience with MongoDB, Docker, Kubernetes, and AWS CDK. His TDD advocacy, open-source testing libraries, and mentoring history signal strong engineering culture fit. The primary gaps are the absence of explicit Nest.js experience (the core backend framework), no mention of Kotlin despite it being a secondary requirement, and Python is entirely absent from the resume. These are learnable gaps for a candidate with this trajectory, making him worth a technical screen.
strengths: 15+ years of full-stack experience with consistent TypeScript/Node.js depth across multiple production-scale systems
Active AI agent infrastructure work at re:cinq, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, directly matching the role's AI agent development requirement
Deep testing culture demonstrated through open-source testing libraries, TDD practice across multiple roles, and publicly delivered testing workshops
concerns: No explicit mention of Nest.js anywhere in the resume, despite it being the primary backend framework for this role
Kotlin is entirely absent from the resume, and Java appears only in passing (robotic arms, mobile orchestration tooling) without depth
Python is not listed under skills or mentioned in any role, despite being listed as a required language proficiency

key_factors.factor: AI agent and MCP infrastructure experience
